title: /cfg
text: /cfg Specify the environment in which services will be executed. /cfg= ConfigFile Used With /sto Description During export of interface definitions, specify the environment in which services will be executed. ConfigFile specifies the name of the configuration definition file created with the Uniface COM Configuration ( uComCfg ) tool, by which you specify different combinations of .ini files, .asn files, and start-up shells.
